disclaimer: No installable extension packages have been released yet.

extensions.name: Broadway Ingest
extensions.summary: HTTP event validation, idempotency, back-pressure, and TimescaleDB ingestion.

extensions.name: Media Collector
extensions.summary: Collect equipment audio, images, and video from NAS paths into object storage.

extensions.name: Predictive Maintenance
extensions.summary: Equipment anomaly scoring and maintenance recommendation candidates.

extensions.name: OEE & Live Monitor
extensions.summary: Equipment utilization, downtime reasons, and live production dashboards.

extensions.name: ERP Connector
extensions.summary: Synchronize master data, work orders, and production results through explicit system boundaries.

extensions.name: Vision Inspection
extensions.summary: Connect visual, assembly, and dimensional inspection candidates to quality workflows.

extensions.name: Manufacturing LLM
extensions.summary: Permission-aware retrieval over approved manuals and work instructions.
